policy.assignment: within each dominant stratum, keyed permutation then round-robin assignment across five folds

selection_firewall.confirmatory_fold_selection_rule: lowest fold index with train_rows divisible by 28, at least 50 shadow-dev conflict units, and zero edge intersections
forbidden: moving a conflict unit between folds
training or recipe selection on folds 0, 1, 2, or 4 before the terminal fold-3 score
selection_firewall.shadow_dev_access: exactly once after both SFT and ES recipes and states are sealed; never an HPO, dataset, or future-recipe selection surface
